description: Align /ship-spec guidance so successful runs mark PRs ready after implementation, eval, and CI gates pass.

userStories.title: Correct ship-spec finalization contract
userStories.description: As the harness maintainer, I want /ship-spec to describe implementation, eval, CI, and ready finalization so agents do not leave successful PRs draft-only.
acceptanceCriteria: .claude/skills/ship-spec/SKILL.md no longer says v1 stops at draft PR creation
Stage 9 remains a draft PR checkpoint for observability
New finalization stages document executor completion, /eval, /ci-status, and gh pr ready
Draft status is reserved for blocked gates; successful terminal state is ready-for-review

userStories.title: Align root skill summary
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I want AGENTS.md to summarize /ship-spec accurately so the always-loaded contract matches the skill.
acceptanceCriteria: The /ship-spec row says draft PR is a checkpoint, not the end
The row includes the ready-for-review terminal state

userStories.title: Guard the correction with eval coverage
userStories.description: As the maintainer, I want a deterministic probe so stale draft-only guidance cannot silently return.
acceptanceCriteria: The probe requires ready-finalization tokens in the skill and root skill table
The probe passes locally and under the /eval runner
